title: The Princes Swear to Protect Shirahoshi
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Queen Otohime, Unknown person #5, Fish-Man Island Citizens. The core beat is the princes swear to protect shirahoshi.
scene: The scene follows the princes swear to protect shirahoshi, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Queen Otohime, Unknown person #5, Fish-Man Island Citizens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Everyone get back!!! It's on fire !!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: The box of signatures suddenly caught on fire!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: forget about noises. We need to put this fire out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Ahh, how terrible!! All those signatures we gathered ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where did it come from?! who is respon- Bible?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a sniper lurking in the vicinity !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Everyone get away from the Plaza!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Bring a medical team, and quickly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your highnesses, you must hurry to the oarfish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well, isn't this quite the ruckus...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who are you?!!! Stay away from the Princess!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll get you to a hospital in no time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ughhh ....!!! Who is responsible for this?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I will make them regret this !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stay by my side... my angels ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And please... wipe those terrible looks from your faces...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: I was just so happy ... to finally have all those signatures... I did not...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: ...prince Fukaboshi... It is I, not you, who should be bitter.

summary: The Princes Swear to Protect Shirahoshi. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
